description_long: This is a rectangular, one-liter beverage carton with a predominantly white and blue color scheme, featuring a realistic image of a pomegranate and splashing water on the front. The packaging is made of laminated paperboard with a glossy finish, and the front displays the brand 'EVERYDAY A BETTER DAY' and the product name 'Paradise pomegranate' in bold blue and white text. The sides of the carton are covered with nutritional information, ingredients, and multilingual product details, while the back includes a barcode and recycling symbols. The top of the carton is angled and fitted with a small, white, plastic screw cap for pouring. The overall design is modern and visually appealing, with clear branding and product imagery. The carton is designed to be portable and easy to handle, suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or convenience stores.
description: A one-liter rectangular beverage carton with a white plastic screw cap, featuring blue and white branding and a pomegranate image on the front. The carton is glossy, covered in nutritional and product information, and designed for easy handling.
description_view_0: The left side of the carton, showing nutritional facts, a website, and recycling information, with the cap and angled top visible.
description_view_1: The front of the carton, prominently displaying the 'Paradise pomegranate' branding, pomegranate imagery, and a green 'Premium Quality' badge.
description_view_2: The right side of the carton, featuring a barcode, additional product details, and the cap angled at the top.
description_view_3: The back of the carton, densely covered with multilingual product information and nutritional facts, with the cap and angled top visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'EVERYDAY A BETTER DAY' in red, 'Paradise pomegranate' in large blue and white text, a green 'Premium Quality' badge, and a realistic pomegranate image. Sides and back display nutritional facts, barcode, recycling symbols, and multilingual product information in small, black text.
attribute_cap_type: White plastic screw cap, cylindrical with a flat top, located on the angled top corner of the carton.
attribute_transparency: Opaque; the carton material does not allow visibility of the liquid inside.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, angled neck integrated into the carton top, with a threaded section for the screw cap; no additional ridges or flares.
